scripts.verify:three: node -e "import('three').then(({ REVISION }) => { const value = String(REVISION).trim(); const revision = Number(value); if (!/^\d+$/.test(value) || !Number.isSafeInteger(revision) || revision < 185) throw new Error('Three.js r185 or newer is required; found r' + REVISION); if (revision > 185) console.warn('Three.js r' + REVISION + ' is newer than this scaffold verified; review the migration guide and visual baselines.'); console.log('Three.js r' + REVISION); })"
scripts.verify: npm run verify:three && npm run build && npm run audit:local && npm test && npm run build && npm run audit:local
